2026-04-19T05:03:28.5620717Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-19T05:03:28.5622059Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:28.5623187Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:28.5623635Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:28.5624563Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:28.5624927Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:28.5625086Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:28.5625267Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:28.5626082Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:28.5626435Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:28.5627179Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:28.5627628Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-19T05:03:28.5627932Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

Supports reply_to_id for discussion threading.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"The comment text in Markdown format. This is the 'body' field - do not use 'comment_body' or other variations. Provide helpful, relevant information that adds value to the conversation.","type":"string"},"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"item_number":{"description":"The issue, pull request, or discussion number to comment on. If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). If auto-targeting fails (e.g., for schedule or workflow_dispatch triggers), the tool call will fail with an error.","type":["number","string"]},"reply_to_id":{"description":"Node ID of the discussion comment to reply to, enabling threaded discussion comments. Only applicable for discussion comments — ignored for issue and pull request comments.","type":"string"},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for this comment.
